title: Prestwick Airport to Remain Under Government Ownership Following Bidder Withdrawal

sections.heading: Update on Prestwick Airport Sale
sections.content: The Scottish government has confirmed that Prestwick Airport will continue to be government-owned after a potential buyer has withdrawn from the bidding process.

sections.heading: Background Information
sections.content: Since its acquisition in 2013, Prestwick Airport has been managed by the government. The airport's ownership has been a subject of interest, with various parties considering bids.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Prestwick Airport to remain with government as bidder pulls out
